Public record · open archive · SAP draft

What residents actually said
about the Safety Action Plan

Konveio rendered all of these comments as plain HTML, but the search field they offer doesn't let you look across the whole conversation. This page mirrors the comments and adds the search. Same words, same authors, same page references — just in a form you can actually use.

79
Comments
24
Residents
24
Plan pages
2
Documents
About this archive. These comments were left publicly on Olsson's Konveio review pages between March 18 and April 2, 2026, before commenting closed. This page is a courtesy mirror of those public comments, with a search field added. Names appear exactly as residents posted them. Each comment links back to its document on Konveio so you can see it in context. This page is not the official record — it's a reading aid. Showing the initial Konveio comment load · a full pagination scrape requires browser access we don't have.
Type to filter comments by keyword. Results update as you type.
Type
Showing all 79 comments.

Comments

About this archive

A residents' courtesy mirror of the public comment record on the Colorado Springs Safety Action Plan draft. Built so the conversation is searchable and screen-reader friendly. Not the official record.

Source: Konveio Draft Plan · Appendices
